title: DMOW-057 Too much service! Piss Maid Kotomi Asakura - Asakura Kotomi
overview: It was a piss maid who served too much service to the nouveau rich man who is a maid maniac! She distorts and interprets her husband's wishes, and works hard at her work with cruel service because of her love! "Master... Please enjoy a lot of my urine..." From the outside, it looks like a master-servant reversal, but for her, who pours thick urine into her master, it's the best service to give her body and mind! A cute perverted maid's love-filled piss torture! [* There is some disturbance in the image and sound]
